title: mini-chat-translator-To-Chinese
description: A mod that translates the content in the chat box into Chinese and translates the Chinese to be sent into English for sending,There are out-of-the-box, completely free translation services and translations for filling in translation API keys
body:
**Minecraft Simple Chat Translation**

---

## Purpose

- Translate chat messages into Chinese  
- Translate outgoing Chinese messages into English before sending  

---

## Instructions

1. Download the required mod: **Mod Menu**  
2. **Important**: For Minecraft **26.1 and above**, use **YetAnotherConfigLib** as a dependency. For versions **below 26.1**, use **Cloth Config API** instead.  
3. Use local translation (no API key required) or the free version of Google Translate  
4. If local translation or Google Free version doesn't work properly, select other modes and configure the corresponding API key  

![mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1ae92777dcff8886e27e98dba38cd85056336c7.png)

**Mod Version ≥ 1.5.0**  
![mod version >=1.5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dc4e75b1576be1f579d3d2df312586f6b88b7f3.png)

**Mod Version < 1.5.0**  
![mod version<1.5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/130359d1a4c2620b0d8fb4aff39e6a0ef4d4a238.png)

---

## Supported Game Versions & Mod Loader

- **Java Edition**: 26.1, 1.21.8, 1.21.11  
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric  

---

## Future Updates

- In-game configuration changes (completed)  
- Translate input content into English before sending (completed)  
- Support for multiple mod loaders  
- Translate server item names, item descriptions, and tab names  

---

================== Chinese ==================

---

**我的世界简易聊天翻译**

---

## 用途

- 将聊天框中的内容翻译成中文  
- 将需要发送的中文翻译成英文并发送  

---

## 使用说明

1. 下载前置模组：**Mod Menu**  
2. **重要提示**：Minecraft **26.1及以上版本**请使用 **YetAnotherConfigLib** 作为前置模组；**26.1以下版本**请使用 **Cloth Config API**。  
3. 使用无需配置密钥的本地翻译，或直接使用谷歌免费版  
4. 如果本地翻译或谷歌免费版无法正常使用，请选择其他翻译模式并配置对应密钥  

![mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1ae92777dcff8886e27e98dba38cd85056336c7.png)

**模组版本 ≥ 1.5.0**  
![mod version >=1.5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dc4e75b1576be1f579d3d2df312586f6b88b7f3.png)

**模组版本 < 1.5.0**  
![mod version<1.5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/130359d1a4c2620b0d8fb4aff39e6a0ef4d4a238.png)

---

## 目前支持的游戏版本与模组加载器

- **Java Edition**：26.1、1.21.8、1.21.11  
- **模组加载器**：Fabric  

---

## 未来更新计划

- 游戏内更改配置（已完成）  
- 支持将输入内容翻译成英文输出（已完成）  
- 支持多模组加载器  
- 翻译服务器物品名称、物品简介及 Tab 名称栏
